title: Create: Recipe & Additions
description: Adds more recipes and new useful blocks to the Create Mod.
body:
## About
**Create: Recipe & Additions** is an addon that adds more recipes to the create mod, also adds new blocks and soon to come machines.

## Dependencies
This mod requires the Create Mod to be installed in order to function. This addon will not work on its own. You must have the correct version of Create (Fabric or Forge) depending on your modloader.

## Mod Usage
**For modpacks:**
- You are allowed to use this in public modpacks.
- You aren't allowed to modify the mod when using it for a modpack.

**Other usage:**
- You can use this mod if you dont claim it as your own mod.
- You can modify the mod, just don't redistribute the mod.

This mods code is licensed MIT, Textures/Models are all rights reserved.
